name: Dhinakaran A
about: Motivated B.Tech Information Technology student with expertise in Python, SQL, Web Development, REST API integration, and AI-powered solutions. Developed innovative projects and startup initiatives, including ResQNow, focused on solving real-world challenges through technology. Experienced in building full-stack applications, integrating AI tools, and delivering practical software solutions through projects and hackathons. Recognized for technical excellence through hackathon achievements and application development. Strong analytical thinker with excellent teamwork, adaptability, problem-solving skills, and a passion for continuous learning and software engineering.
